scripts.pack: npm run prepare-deps && npm run build:main && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run prepare-deps && npm run build:main && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare-deps && npm run build:main && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare-deps && npm run build:main && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run prepare-deps && npm run build:main && electron-builder --linux
